title: Acrylic Dentures
short_description: Full and partial acrylic denture production, finishing and repair support.
description: Full and partial acrylic dentures are made for practical fit, stable tooth arrangement and smooth base finishing. MEIJIA DENTAL also supports repairs and repeat cases for clinics and partner laboratories.
